To bridge this gap and enable high-quality modeling of human movements in response to spatial audio, we introduce the first comprehensive "Spatial Audio-Driven Human Motion" (SAM) dataset, which contains diverse and high-quality spatial audio and motion data. For benchmarking, we develop a simple yet effective diffusion-based generative framework for human "MOtion generation driven by SPatial Audio," termed MOSPA, which faithfully captures the relationship between body motion and spatial audio through an effective fusion mechanism. Once trained, MOSPA can generate diverse realistic human motions conditioned on varying spatial audio inputs. We perform a thorough investigation of the proposed dataset and conduct extensive experiments for benchmarking, where our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on this task. Our code and model are publicly available at https://github.com/xsy27/Mospa-Acoustic-driven-Motion-Generation.git

papers.title: SAVVY: Spatial Awareness via Audio-Visual LLMs through Seeing and Hearing
papers.abstract: 3D spatial reasoning in dynamic, audio-visual environments is a cornerstone of human cognition yet remains largely unexplored by existing Audio-Visual Large Language Models (AV-LLMs) and benchmarks, which predominantly focus on static or 2D scenes. We introduce SAVVY-Bench, the first benchmark for 3D spatial reasoning in dynamic scenes with synchronized spatial audio. SAVVY-Bench is comprised of thousands of carefully curated question–answer pairs probing both directional and distance relationships involving static and moving objects, and requires fine-grained temporal grounding, consistent 3D localization, and multi-modal annotation. To tackle this challenge, we propose SAVVY, a novel training-free reasoning pipeline that consists of two stages: (i) Egocentric Spatial Tracks Estimation, which leverages AV-LLMs as well as other audio-visual methods to track the trajectories of key objects related to the query using both visual and spatial audio cues, and (ii) Dynamic Global Map Construction, which aggregates multi-modal queried object trajectories and converts them into a unified global dynamic map. Using the constructed map, a final QA answer is obtained through a coordinate transformation that aligns the global map with the queried viewpoint. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that SAVVY substantially enhances performance of state-of-the-art AV-LLMs, setting a new standard and stage for approaching dynamic 3D spatial reasoning in AV-LLMs.

papers.title: Hear you are: Teaching LLMs Spatial Reasoning with Vision and Spatial Sound
papers.abstract: Many audio-visual learning methods have focused on aligning audio and visual information, either through semantic or temporal correspondence. However, most of these works have utilized monaural audio, which does not contain information about the spatial location of the sound source. In contrast, humans and other animals utilize binaural hearing to perceive this spatial information. Combining spatial sound and visual perception enables powerful high-level reasoning: for example, a person looking for their phone may hear the ringing sound coming from a backpack sitting on a table, and quickly infer that the missing phone is inside the backpack. In this paper, we investigate the problem of Audio-Visual Spatial Reasoning. We design a spatial audio-visual question answering dataset to cover scenarios where semantic correspondence between audio and visual signals is absent but spatial alignment exists, as well as cases with multiple audio-visual semantic correspondences that require spatial reasoning to disambiguate. We propose a model that learns spatial comprehension across the audio and vision modalities by connecting them with a large language model and experimentally demonstrate that spatial sound perception is an essential part of our task.

papers.title: DeepASA: An Object-Oriented Multi-Purpose Network for Auditory Scene Analysis
papers.abstract: We propose DeepASA, a multi-purpose model for auditory scene analysis that performs multi-input multi-output (MIMO) source separation, dereverberation, sound event detection (SED), audio classification, and direction-of-arrival estimation (DoAE) within a unified framework. DeepASA is designed for complex auditory scenes where multiple, often similar, sound sources overlap in time and move dynamically in space. To achieve robust and consistent inference across tasks, we introduce an object-oriented processing (OOP) strategy. This approach encapsulates diverse auditory features into object-centric representations and refines them through a chain-of-inference (CoI) mechanism. The pipeline comprises a dynamic temporal kernel-based feature extractor, a transformer-based aggregator, and an object separator that yields per-object features. These features feed into multiple task-specific decoders. Our object-centric representations naturally resolve the parameter association ambiguity inherent in traditional track-wise processing. However, early-stage object separation can lead to failure in downstream ASA tasks. To address this, we implement temporal coherence matching (TCM) within the chain-of-inference, enabling multi-task fusion and iterative refinement of object features using estimated auditory parameters. We evaluate DeepASA on representative spatial audio benchmark datasets, including ASA2, MC-FUSS, and STARSS23. Experimental results show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance across all evaluated tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness in both source separation and auditory parameter estimation under diverse spatial auditory scenes. The demo video, samples and code are available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/donghoney22/DeepASA.

papers.title: Seeing Sound, Hearing Sight: Uncovering Modality Bias and Conflict of AI models in Sound Localization
papers.abstract:
Imagine hearing a dog bark and instinctively turning toward the sound—only to find a parked car, while a silent dog sits nearby. Such moments of sensory conflict challenge perception, yet humans flexibly resolve these discrepancies, prioritizing auditory cues over misleading visuals to accurately localize sounds.  Despite the rapid advancement of multimodal AI models that integrate vision and sound, little is known about how these systems handle cross-modal conflicts or whether they favor one modality over another. Here, we systematically and quantitatively examine modality bias and conflict resolution in AI models for Sound Source Localization (SSL). We evaluate a wide range of state-of-the-art multimodal models and compare them against human performance in psychophysics experiments spanning six audiovisual conditions, including congruent, conflicting, and absent visual and audio cues. Our results reveal that humans consistently outperform AI in SSL and exhibit greater robustness to conflicting or absent visual information by effectively prioritizing auditory signals. In contrast, AI shows a pronounced bias toward vision, often failing to suppress irrelevant or conflicting visual input, leading to chance-level performance. To bridge this gap, we present EchoPin, a neuroscience-inspired multimodal model for SSL that emulates human auditory perception. The model is trained on our carefully curated AudioCOCO dataset, in which stereo audio signals are first rendered using a physics-based 3D simulator, then filtered with Head-Related Transfer Functions (HRTFs) to capture pinnae, head, and torso effects, and finally transformed into cochleagram representations that mimic cochlear processing. To eliminate existing biases in standard benchmark datasets, we carefully controlled the vocal object sizes, semantics, and spatial locations in the corresponding images of AudioCOCO. EchoPin outperforms existing models trained on standard audio-visual datasets. Remarkably, consistent with neuroscience findings, it exhibits a human-like localization bias, favoring horizontal (left–right) precision over vertical (up–down) precision. 
This asymmetry likely arises from HRTF-shaped and cochlear-modulated stereo audio and the lateral placement of human ears, highlighting how sensory input quality and physical structure jointly shape precision of multimodal representations. All code, data, and models are available \href{https://github.com/CuriseJia/SSHS}{here}.

papers.title: World-aware Planning Narratives Enhance Large Vision-Language Model Planner
papers.abstract:
Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) show promise for embodied planning tasks but struggle with complex scenarios involving unfamiliar environments and multi-step goals. 
Current approaches rely on environment-agnostic imitation learning that disconnects instructions from environmental contexts, causing models to struggle with context-sensitive instructions and rely on supplementary cues rather than visual reasoning during long-horizon interactions.
In this work, we propose World-Aware Planning Narrative Enhancement (WAP), a framework that infuses LVLMs with comprehensive environmental understanding through four cognitive capabilities (visual appearance modeling, spatial reasoning, functional abstraction, and syntactic grounding) while developing and evaluating models using only raw visual observations through curriculum learning.
Evaluations on the EB-ALFRED benchmark demonstrate substantial improvements, with Qwen2.5-VL achieving a 60.7 absolute improvement in task success rates—particularly in commonsense reasoning (+60.0) and long-horizon planning (+70.0). Notably, our enhanced open-source models outperform proprietary systems like GPT-4o and Claude-3.5-Sonnet by a large margin.

papers.title: Provable Ordering and Continuity in Vision-Language Pretraining for Generalizable Embodied Agents
papers.abstract:
Pre-training vision-language representations on human action videos has emerged
as a promising approach to reduce reliance on large-scale expert demonstrations
for training embodied agents. However, prior methods often employ time con-
trastive learning based on goal-reaching heuristics, progressively aligning language
instructions from the initial to the final frame. This overemphasis on future frames
can result in erroneous vision-language associations, as actions may terminate
early or include irrelevant moments in the end. To address this issue, we propose
Action Temporal Coherence Learning (AcTOL) to learn ordered and continuous
vision-language representations without rigid goal-based constraint. AcTOL treats
a video as a continuous trajectory where it (1) contrasts semantic differences be-
tween frames to reflect their natural ordering, and (2) imposes a local Brownian
bridge constraint to ensure smooth transitions across intermediate frames. Exten-
sive imitation learning experiments on both simulated and real robots show that the
pretrained features significantly enhance downstream manipulation tasks with high
robustness to different linguistic styles of instructions, offering a viable pathway
toward generalized embodied agents. Our project page is at https://actol-pretrain.github.io/.

papers.title: ROVER: Recursive Reasoning Over Videos with Vision-Language Models for Embodied Tasks
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have exhibited impressive capabilities across diverse image understanding tasks, but still struggle in settings that require reasoning over extended sequences of camera frames from a video. This limits their utility in embodied settings, which require reasoning over long frame sequences from a continuous stream of visual input at each moment of a task attempt. To address this limitation, we propose ROVER (Reasoning Over VidEo Recursively), a framework that enables the model to recursively decompose long-horizon video trajectories into segments corresponding to shorter subtasks within the trajectory. In doing so, ROVER facilitates more focused and accurate reasoning over temporally localized frame sequences without losing global context. We evaluate ROVER, implemented using an in-context learning approach, on diverse OpenX Embodiment videos and on a new dataset derived from RoboCasa that consists of 543 videos showing both expert and perturbed non-expert trajectories across 27 manipulation tasks. ROVER outperforms strong baselines across three video reasoning tasks: task progress estimation, frame-level natural language reasoning, and video question answering. We observe that, by reducing the number of frames the model reasons over at each timestep, ROVER mitigates model hallucinations, especially during unexpected or non-optimal moments of a trajectory. In addition, by enabling the implementation of a subtask-specific sliding context window, ROVER's time complexity scales linearly with video length, an asymptotic improvement over baselines.

papers.title: Robot-R1: Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced Embodied Reasoning in Robotics
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have recently shown great promise in advancing robotics by combining embodied reasoning with robot control. A common approach involves training on embodied reasoning tasks related to robot control using Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). However, SFT datasets are often heuristically constructed and not explicitly optimized for improving robot control. Furthermore, SFT often leads to issues such as catastrophic forgetting and reduced generalization performance. To address these limitations, we introduce Robot-R1, a novel framework that leverages reinforcement learning to enhance embodied reasoning specifically for robot control. Robot-R1 learns to predict the next keypoint state required for task completion, conditioned on the current scene image and environment metadata derived from expert demonstrations. Inspired by the DeepSeek-R1 learning approach, Robot-R1 samples reasoning-based responses and reinforces those that lead to more accurate predictions. Our experiments show that models trained with Robot-R1 outperform SFT methods on embodied reasoning tasks. Despite having only 7B parameters, Robot-R1 even surpasses GPT-4o on reasoning tasks related to low-level action control, such as spatial and movement reasoning.

papers.title: Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation: Optimal Transport and Graph-Driven Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) poses a formidable challenge for autonomous agents, requiring seamless integration of natural language instructions and visual observations to navigate complex 3D indoor spaces. Existing approaches often falter in long-horizon tasks due to limited scene understanding, inefficient planning, and lack of robust decision-making frameworks. We introduce the \textbf{Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation (HSAN)} framework, a groundbreaking approach that redefines VLN-CE through three synergistic innovations. First, HSAN constructs a dynamic hierarchical semantic scene graph, leveraging vision-language models to capture multi-level environmental representations—from objects to regions to zones—enabling nuanced spatial reasoning. Second, it employs an optimal transport-based topological planner, grounded in Kantorovich's duality, to select long-term goals by balancing semantic relevance and spatial accessibility with theoretical guarantees of optimality. Third, a graph-aware reinforcement learning policy ensures precise low-level control, navigating subgoals while robustly avoiding obstacles. By integrating spectral graph theory, optimal transport, and advanced multi-modal learning, HSAN addresses the shortcomings of static maps and heuristic planners prevalent in prior work. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging VLN-CE datasets demonstrate that HSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in navigation success and generalization to unseen environments.

papers.title: NavBench: Probing Multimodal Large Language Models for Embodied Navigation
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong generalization in vision-language tasks, yet their ability to understand and act within embodied environments remains underexplored. We present NavBench, a benchmark to evaluate the embodied navigation capabilities of MLLMs under zero-shot settings. NavBench consists of two components: (1) navigation comprehension, assessed through three cognitively grounded tasks including global instruction alignment, temporal progress estimation, and local observation-action reasoning, covering 3,200 question-answer pairs; and (2) step-by-step execution in 432 episodes across 72 indoor scenes, stratified by spatial, cognitive, and execution complexity. To support real-world deployment, we introduce a pipeline that converts MLLMs' outputs into robotic actions. We evaluate both proprietary and open-source models, finding that GPT-4o performs well across tasks, while lighter open-source models succeed in simpler cases. Results also show that models with higher comprehension scores tend to achieve better execution performance. Providing map-based context improves decision accuracy, especially in medium-difficulty scenarios. However, most models struggle with temporal understanding, particularly in estimating progress during navigation, which may pose a key challenge.

papers.title: BeliefMapNav: 3D Voxel-Based Belief Map for Zero-Shot Object Navigation
papers.abstract: Zero-shot object navigation (ZSON) allows robots to find target objects in unfamiliar environments using natural language instructions, without relying on pre-built maps or task-specific training. Recent general-purpose models, such as large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs), equip agents with semantic reasoning abilities to estimate target object locations in a zero-shot manner. However, these models often greedily select the next goal without maintaining a global understanding of the environment and are fundamentally limited in the spatial reasoning necessary for effective navigation. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel 3D voxel-based belief map that estimates the target’s prior presence distribution within a voxelized 3D space. This approach enables agents to integrate semantic priors from LLMs and visual embeddings with hierarchical spatial structure, alongside real-time observations, to build a comprehensive 3D global posterior belief of the target’s location. Building on this 3D voxel map, we introduce BeliefMapNav, an efficient navigation system with two key advantages: i) grounding LLM semantic reasoning within the 3D hierarchical semantics voxel space for precise target position estimation, and ii) integrating sequential path planning to enable efficient global navigation decisions. Experiments on HM3D and HSSD benchmarks show that BeliefMapNav achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) Success Rate (SR) and Success weighted by Path Length (SPL), with a notable 9.7 SPL improvement over the previous best SR method, validating its effectiveness and efficiency.

papers.title: Distilling LLM Prior to Flow Model for Generalizable Agent’s Imagination in Object Goal Navigation
papers.abstract: The Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) task challenges agents to locate a specified object in an unseen environment by imagining unobserved regions of the scene. Prior approaches rely on deterministic and discriminative models to complete semantic maps, overlooking the inherent uncertainty in indoor layouts and limiting their ability to generalize to unseen environments. In this work, we propose GOAL, a generative flow-based framework that models the semantic distribution of indoor environments by bridging observed regions with LLM-enriched full-scene semantic maps. During training, spatial priors inferred from large language models (LLMs) are encoded as two-dimensional Gaussian fields and injected into target maps, distilling rich contextual knowledge into the flow model and enabling more generalizable completions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GOAL achieves state-of-the-art performance on MP3D and Gibson, and shows strong generalization in transfer settings to HM3D.

papers.title: ESCA: Contextualizing Embodied Agents via Scene-Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) are making rapid progress toward general-purpose embodied agents. However, existing MLLMs do not reliably capture fine-grained links between low-level visual features and high-level textual semantics, leading to weak grounding and inaccurate perception. To overcome this challenge, we propose ESCA, a framework that contextualizes embodied agents by grounding their perception in spatial-temporal scene graphs. At its core is SGCLIP, a novel, open-domain, promptable foundation model for generating scene graphs that is based on CLIP.  SGCLIP is trained on 87K+ open-domain videos using a neurosymbolic pipeline that aligns automatically generated captions with scene graphs produced by the model itself, eliminating the need for human-labeled annotations. We demonstrate that SGCLIP excels in both prompt-based inference and task-specific fine-tuning, achieving state-of-the-art results on scene graph generation and action localization benchmarks. ESCA with SGCLIP improves perception for embodied agents based on both open-source and commercial MLLMs, achieving state of-the-art performance across two embodied environments. Notably, ESCA significantly reduces agent perception errors and enables open-source models to surpass proprietary baselines. We release the source code for SGCLIP model training at https://github.com/video-fm/LASER and for the embodied agent at https://github.com/video-fm/ESCA.

papers.title: Resounding Acoustic Fields with Reciprocity
papers.abstract:
Achieving immersive auditory experiences in virtual environments requires flexible sound modeling that supports dynamic source positions.
In this paper, we introduce a task called resounding, which aims to estimate room impulse responses at arbitrary emitter location from a sparse set of measured emitter positions, analogous to the relighting problem in vision.
We leverage the reciprocity property and introduce Versa, a physics-inspired approach to facilitating acoustic field learning.
Our method creates physically valid samples with dense virtual emitter positions by exchanging emitter and listener poses.
We also identify challenges in deploying reciprocity due to emitter/listener gain patterns and propose a self-supervised learning approach to address them.
Results show that Versa substantially improve the performance of acoustic field learning on both simulated and real-world datasets across different metrics.
Perceptual user studies show that Versa can greatly improve the immersive spatial sound experience.

papers.title: PhysVLM-AVR: Active Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models in Physical Environments
papers.abstract: Visual reasoning in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has primarily been studied in passive, static settings, limiting their effectiveness in real-world physical environments where an embodied agent must contend with incomplete information due to occlusion or a limited field of view. Humans, in contrast, leverage their embodiment to actively explore and interact with their environment—moving, examining, and manipulating objects—to gather information through a closed-loop process integrating perception, reasoning, and action. Inspired by this capability, we introduce the Active Visual Reasoning (AVR) task, extending visual reasoning to a paradigm of embodied interaction in partially observable environments. AVR necessitates embodied agents to: (1) actively acquire information via sequential physical actions, (2) integrate observations across multiple steps for coherent reasoning, and (3) dynamically adjust decisions based on evolving visual feedback. To rigorously evaluate AVR, we introduce CLEVR-AVR, a simulation benchmark featuring multi-round interactive environments designed to assess both reasoning correctness and information-gathering efficiency. We present AVR-152k, a large-scale dataset that offers rich Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotations detailing iterative reasoning for uncertainty identification, action-conditioned information gain prediction, and information-maximizing action selection, crucial for training agents in a higher-order Markov Decision Process. Building on this, we develop PhysVLM-AVR, an embodied MLLM achieving state-of-the-art performance on CLEVR-AVR, embodied reasoning (OpenEQA, RoboVQA), and passive visual reasoning (GeoMath, Geometry30K). Our analysis also reveals that current embodied MLLMs, despite detecting information incompleteness, struggle to actively acquire and integrate new information through interaction, highlighting a fundamental gap in active reasoning capabilities.

papers.title: ActiveVOO: Value of Observation Guided Active Knowledge Acquisition for Open-World Embodied Lifted Regression Planning
papers.abstract: The ability to actively acquire information is essential for open-world planning under partial observability and incomplete knowledge. However, most existing embodied AI systems either assume a known object category or rely on passive perception strategies that exhaustively gather object and relational information from the environment. Such a strategy becomes insufficient in visually complex open-world settings. For instance, a typical household may contain thousands of novel and uniquely configured objects, most of which are irrelevant to the agent’s current task. Consequently, open-world agents must be capable of actively identifying and prioritizing task-relevant objects to enable efficient and goal-directed knowledge acquisition. In this work, we introduce ActiveVOO, a novel zero-shot framework for open-world embodied planning that emphasizes object-centric active knowledge acquisition. ActiveVOO employs lifted regression to generate compact, first-order subgoal descriptions that identify task-relevant objects, and provides a principled mechanism to quantify the utility of sensing actions based on commonsense priors derived from LLMs and VLMs. We evaluate ActiveVOO on the visual ALFWorld benchmark, where it achieves substantial improvements over existing LLM- and VLM-based planning approaches, notably outperforming VLMs fine-tuned on ALFWorld data. This work establishes a principled foundation for developing embodied agents capable of actively and efficiently acquiring knowledge to plan and act in open-world environments.

llm_ranked.tldr_cn: Metis提出了一种基于掩码生成预训练的统一语音生成基础模型，在大规模无标签语音上预训练后通过微调适配多种生成任务。它使用SSL令牌和声学令牌两种离散表示，在多种语音生成任务（如TTS、语音转换）上均达到先进效果，验证了预训练-微调范式在语音生成中的有效性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Metis：基于掩码生成预训练的基础语音生成模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音生成模型多为任务特定或简单多任务，缺乏统一的预训练基础模型。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用SSL令牌和声学令牌的双表示，在30万小时无标签语音上进行掩码生成预训练，再通过任务特定条件微调。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种语音生成任务上达到最优或接近最优性能，且模型规模可扩展。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Metis为统一语音生成与理解提供了有效的预训练框架，推动了基础模型在语音领域的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: unified speech generation and understanding

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLA framework with world knowledge forecasting for robot manipulation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 结合世界知识预测的视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人操作
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 结合世界知识预测的视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人操作
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DreamVLA integrates comprehensive world knowledge forecasting into a VLA framework, enabling inverse dynamics modeling and a perception-prediction-action loop for robot manipulation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出DreamVLA，一种新颖的VLA框架，通过集成全面的世界知识预测（包括动态、空间和语义信息）实现逆动力学建模，建立感知-预测-动作循环。该方法在机器人操作任务中显著提升了泛化能力和推理能力，优于现有基于图像预测的方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DreamVLA：具备全面世界知识的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLA模型局限于图像预测，缺乏全面的世界知识，限制了机器人操作的泛化性和推理能力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入动态区域引导的世界知识预测模块，结合逆动力学建模，形成感知-预测-动作循环。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人操作基准上，DreamVLA取得了优于现有方法的性能，展现了更强的泛化和推理能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: DreamVLA通过世界知识预测显著提升了VLA模型在机器人操作中的表现，为具身智能提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multi-stage training for vision and speech interaction enabling speech-to-speech dialogue
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多阶段训练实现视觉和语音交互，支持语音到语音对话
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多阶段训练实现视觉和语音交互，支持语音到语音对话
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VITA-1.5 proposes a multi-stage training method that progressively trains an LLM to understand vision and speech, enabling real-time speech-to-speech dialogue without separate ASR.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出VITA-1.5，通过精心设计的多阶段训练，逐步让大语言模型同时理解视觉和语音信息，最终实现流畅的视觉-语音交互。该方法不仅保持了强大的视觉-语言能力，还能进行高效的语音到语音对话，无需单独的ASR模块。实验表明，VITA-1.5在视觉和语音任务上均达到GPT-4o水平，为多模态交互系统提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VITA-1.5：迈向GPT-4o级别的实时视觉和语音交互
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有多模态大模型侧重视觉和文本，较少强调语音在交互中的作用，难以同时实现高性能。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用多阶段训练策略，逐步训练LLM融合视觉和语音信息，最终实现语音到语音交互。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在视觉-语言和语音对话基准上达到GPT-4o水平，且延迟低。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多阶段训练是构建统一视觉-语音交互模型的有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: speech to speech translation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Vision-Language-Action model for cross-task manipulation generalization
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向跨任务操作泛化的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向跨任务操作泛化的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces AGNOSTOS benchmark to evaluate zero-shot cross-task generalization of VLA models in manipulation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在未见任务上的泛化能力尚未充分探索。本文提出AGNOSTOS仿真基准，包含23个未见操作任务和两级难度，系统评估了VLA模型的跨任务零样本泛化性能，揭示了当前模型尽管在多样化数据集上训练但仍面临挑战。该工作为VLA模型泛化研究提供了标准化测试平台。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 探索视觉-语言-动作操作在跨任务泛化中的极限
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前VLA模型在开放世界中的跨任务泛化能力尚未被系统研究，缺乏标准化评估基准。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出AGNOSTOS基准，包含23个未见操作任务和两种泛化难度级别，用于评估VLA模型的零样本泛化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 系统评估揭示了现有VLA模型跨任务泛化的局限性，即使经过多样化数据集训练仍表现不佳。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: AGNOSTOS为VLA模型泛化研究提供了重要评估工具，推动了通用机器人操作的发展。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: MoE-based world model for multi-task multi-agent RL and planning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于混合专家（MoE）的世界模型用于多任务多智能体强化学习与规划
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于混合专家（MoE）的世界模型用于多任务多智能体强化学习与规划
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Applies mixture-of-experts to world model instead of policy, enabling bounded similarity learning across multi-agent tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 多任务多智能体强化学习面临任务间最优策略差异大的挑战。本文发现任务动力学具有有界相似性，并基于此提出M3W方法，将混合专家（MoE）应用于世界模型而非策略，使得模型能够利用任务组内相似性进行高效学习与规划。实验表明该方法在多任务设置中显著优于基线。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过基于混合专家（MoE）的世界模型学习与规划多智能体任务
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多任务多智能体强化学习因任务间最优策略差异大而泛化困难。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出M3W方法，将混合专家（MoE）应用于世界模型，利用任务动力学的有界相似性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: M3W在多任务多智能体设置中表现出更好的泛化性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 将MoE应用于世界模型而非策略，是一种有效的多任务学习范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Standalone speech LLM for full-duplex conversation without codec injection
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 无需编解码器注入的独立语音大语言模型实现全双工对话
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 无需编解码器注入的独立语音大语言模型实现全双工对话
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces SALMONN-omni, a single LLM for full-duplex speech conversation without codec injection, addressing error accumulation and performance degradation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有全双工语音对话系统常采用模块化架构或注入音频编解码器，导致错误累积和性能下降。本文提出SALMONN-omni，首个无需编解码器注入的独立语音大语言模型，能够在单一模型中完成语音理解与生成，实现了自然的全双工对话，在多项指标上达到最优。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SALMONN-omni: 无需编解码器注入的独立语音大语言模型实现全双工对话
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有全双工语音对话系统因模块化或编解码器注入导致错误累积和性能下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SALMONN-omni，单一LLM直接处理语音输入输出，无需编解码器注入。
llm_ranked.result_cn: SALMONN-omni在全双工对话任务中展现了优越的性能和自然度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 无需编解码器注入的独立语音LLM是实现高效全双工对话的有前景方向。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: unified speech generation and understanding

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Systematic study of planning representations and paradigms in VLA models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLA模型中规划表示与范式的系统性研究
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLA模型中规划表示与范式的系统性研究
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VLA-OS dissects planning paradigms and representations in VLA models, isolating effects from architectures and data.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在复杂操作任务中表现出色，但不同方法的架构、规划范式和表示差异巨大，难以辨别性能来源。本文提出VLA-OS框架，系统分离这些因素，通过消融实验揭示了不同规划表示和范式对性能的影响，为VLA模型设计提供了重要指导。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VLA-OS: 结构化和剖析视觉-语言-动作模型中的规划表示与范式
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLA模型在规划表示和范式上存在差异，难以确定性能提升的根本原因。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出VLA-OS框架，隔离网络架构和训练数据，系统比较不同规划范式与表示。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 揭示了不同规划表示和范式对VLA模型性能的差异化影响。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该研究为VLA模型的规划设计提供了系统性的理解与指导。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Vision-Language-Action model for robot manipulation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人操作
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人操作
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VideoVLA transforms video generation models into VLA robot manipulators, predicting actions and future visual outcomes from language and images.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有VLA模型泛化能力有限，难以应对新任务和场景。本文提出VideoVLA，将大型视频生成模型转化为机器人VLA操作器，通过多模态扩散Transformer联合建模视频、语言和动作模态，从语言指令和图像预测动作序列及未来视觉结果。实验表明该方法提升了泛化能力，为机器人操作提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VideoVLA：视频生成器可成为通用机器人操作器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLA模型泛化到新任务、物体和环境的能力有限，需要更通用的操作策略。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 基于多模态扩散Transformer，将视频生成模型转化为VLA操作器，联合建模视频、语言和动作模态。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多项机器人操作任务上，VideoVLA展现了对新任务的更好泛化能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 视频生成模型可以有效地转化为VLA操作器，为通用机器人操作提供新思路。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Vision-Language-Action model with hybrid autoregression and diffusion
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 混合自回归与扩散的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 混合自回归与扩散的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: HybridVLA combines autoregressive and diffusion methods in a unified VLA model for precise continuous robot control.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有自回归VLA模型将动作离散化，损失连续性；扩散VLA模型未充分利用VLM推理能力。本文提出HybridVLA，在统一VLA模型中协作自回归与扩散，同时利用VLM推理和连续动作控制，提升机器人操作精度和泛化性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: HybridVLA：统一视觉-语言-动作模型中的协作自回归与扩散
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 自回归VLA离散化动作损失连续性，扩散VLA未充分使用VLM推理能力，需要两者结合。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计统一VLA架构，协作自回归预测离散动作token和扩散生成连续动作。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人操作基准上，HybridVLA实现了更高的控制精度和泛化能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 自回归与扩散的协作可以兼顾VLM推理与连续控制，是VLA模型的有效设计。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Text-to-speech synthesis with flow matching
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于流匹配的文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于流匹配的文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Shallow Flow Matching improves TTS by starting from intermediate states for coarse-to-fine generation, reducing computation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有流匹配TTS模型从纯噪声生成，计算开销大。本文提出浅层流匹配（SFM），在粗到细生成范式中从粗表示构造中间状态开始推理，聚焦后期精化阶段，显著提升计算效率。集成到多个TTS模型后，在保持高质量的同时加速了推理。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 浅层流匹配用于粗到细文本到语音合成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 传统流匹配TTS从纯噪声开始，计算成本高，需要更高效的生成路径。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SFM机制，从弱生成器的粗表示中构造流路径中间状态，推理从中间状态开始。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 集成到多个TTS模型后，在保持音质的同时显著减少了推理步骤和计算量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 粗到细的流匹配策略能够有效加速TTS推理，适用于多种模型架构。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: expressive speech synthesis

llm_ranked.evidence_en: World models for rapid motor adaptation in reinforcement learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 世界模型用于强化学习中的快速运动适应
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 世界模型用于强化学习中的快速运动适应
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Reflexive World Models use world model predictions as reference trajectories for rapid motor adaptation with low online computation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 学习型控制策略在动态变化环境中性能下降，重新训练成本高。本文提出反思世界模型（RWM），将世界模型预测作为隐式参考轨迹，分离长期强化学习奖励最大化与快速运动执行，在保持近优性能的同时，实现比基于模型的RL基线更快的在线适应和低计算开销。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 世界模型作为快速运动适应的参考轨迹
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 环境动态变化导致学习策略失效，现有方法适应慢或计算成本高。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出RWM双控制框架，使用世界模型预测作为隐式参考轨迹，将长期RL与快速潜空间控制分离。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个仿真和真实场景中，RWM适应速度显著提升，在线计算量低，性能接近最优。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 世界模型可作为参考轨迹实现快速适应，兼顾长期优化与短期鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Unified speech language modeling for generation and understanding
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 统一语音语言模型用于生成和理解
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 统一语音语言模型用于生成和理解
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SLED models speech in continuous latent space with energy distance, avoiding discretization errors and enabling unified speech generation and understanding.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有语音语言模型依赖残差量化，引入离散化误差和复杂层级架构。本文提出SLED，将语音波形编码为连续潜表示，利用能量距离目标进行自回归建模，无需量化即可捕获连续分布。SLED简化了流水线，并同时支持语音生成和理解任务，在语音语言建模上达到了竞争性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过连续潜空间中的能量距离实现高效语音语言建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 残差向量量化导致信息损失和架构复杂，需要更简洁的连续语音建模方法。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将语音编码为连续潜变量序列，使用能量距离目标进行自回归训练，避免离散化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音生成和理解基准上取得与量化方法相当或更好的结果，且模型更简单。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 连续潜空间语音语言建模是取代量化方法的有效且高效的方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: unified speech generation and understanding

llm_ranked.evidence_en: unified speech understanding and generation, voice-to-voice interaction
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 统一的语音理解与生成，语音到语音交互
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 统一的语音理解与生成，语音到语音交互
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Audio Flamingo 3 is a fully open large audio-language model that advances reasoning and understanding across speech, sound, and music, with capabilities including unified audio encoding, chain-of-thought reasoning, multi-turn multi-audio chat, long audio understanding, and voice-to-voice interaction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出Audio Flamingo 3，一个完全开源的大型音频语言模型，在语音、声音和音乐三个模态上实现了推理与理解的显著提升。模型引入统一的音频编码器AF-Whisper，支持按需思考、多轮多音频对话、长达10分钟的音频理解以及语音到语音交互。通过创新的大规模训练数据集，该模型在多项音频理解与生成任务上达到最先进水平，为统一语音生成与理解提供了强大基座。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Audio Flamingo 3：通过完全开源的大型音频语言模型推进音频智能
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有音频语言模型在跨模态推理和统一语音理解与生成方面存在不足，且缺乏完全开源的高性能模型。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Audio Flamingo 3，包含统一音频编码器AF-Whisper、按需思维链推理、多轮多音频对话、长音频理解及语音到语音交互等能力。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个音频理解与生成任务上达到最先进水平，包括语音识别、声音事件检测、音乐理解等。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: Audio Flamingo 3作为一个完全开源模型，为语音生成与理解统一领域提供了强大且可复用的基座。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: unified speech generation and understanding

llm_ranked.evidence_en: world model for spatial reasoning, test-time scaling
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于空间推理的世界模型，测试时扩展
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于空间推理的世界模型，测试时扩展
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpatialNavigator, a test-time scaling framework that couples a VLM with a controllable world model based on video diffusion for 3D spatial reasoning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文指出大视觉语言模型缺乏对3D动态场景的内部模型，提出测试时扩展框架SpatialNavigator。该框架将VLM与基于视频扩散的可控世界模型耦合，通过迭代规划相机轨迹并合成视图，使VLM能够利用多视角证据进行空间推理。在多个3D空间推理基准上，该方法显著提升了VLM的准确性，展示了世界模型在增强语言模型空间认知中的关键作用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MindJourney：基于世界模型的测试时扩展用于空间推理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大视觉语言模型缺乏对3D动态场景的内部模型，在简单空间推理任务中表现不佳。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpatialNavigator框架，将VLM与基于视频扩散的可控世界模型耦合，通过测试时迭代规划与视图合成增强空间推理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个3D空间推理基准上显著提升准确率，证明了世界模型的有效性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 将世界模型与VLM在测试时结合是增强空间推理能力的有效方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: spatial audio processing, 3D spatial reasoning with audio
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 空间音频处理，基于音频的3D空间推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 空间音频处理，基于音频的3D空间推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces SAVVY-Bench, a benchmark for 3D spatial reasoning in dynamic scenes with spatial audio, and a training-free reasoning pipeline SAVVY.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文指出现有音频-视觉语言模型缺乏对动态3D场景中的空间推理能力，因此引入首个包含同步空间音频的3D空间推理基准SAVVY-Bench。同时提出无需训练的推理流水线SAVVY，通过两阶段处理实现方位和距离关系的细粒度推理。该工作推动了空间音频处理与渲染技术在具身智能中的应用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SAVVY：通过看和听实现音频-视觉大语言模型的空间感知
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有音频-视觉大语言模型缺乏对动态3D场景中带空间音频的空间推理能力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SAVVY-Bench基准和SAVVY无训练推理流水线，通过两阶段处理实现方向和距离推理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在SAVVY-Bench上验证了方法有效性，显著提升空间音频场景下的3D推理准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 空间音频的引入对于提升大语言模型的3D空间感知至关重要。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: spatial audio processing and rendering techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Generative world model with scale-wise autoregression and motion prompt
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 生成式世界模型，结合尺度自回归与运动提示
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 生成式世界模型，结合尺度自回归与运动提示
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SAMPO proposes a hybrid framework combining visual autoregressive intra-frame generation with causal next-frame modeling for world models, improving spatial coherence and motion modeling.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: SAMPO针对自回归世界模型的视觉预测不连贯问题，提出混合框架，在帧内使用视觉自回归生成，帧间使用因果建模，并引入运动提示。该方法在保持空间局部性的同时支持并行解码，显著提升了世界模型的视觉质量和运动预测能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SAMPO：用于生成式世界模型的尺度自回归与运动提示
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有自回归世界模型在视觉预测中缺乏空间一致性，解码效率低且运动建模不足。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出尺度自回归与运动提示的混合框架，结合双向空间注意力和时序因果解码。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个环境基准上，SAMPO生成的预测更清晰、运动更自然，优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SAMPO为具身智能体提供更可靠的世界模型，支持高效规划与控制。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Interactive world models for video generation with VRAG
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向交互式视频生成的世界模型，结合VRAG
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向交互式视频生成的世界模型，结合VRAG
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This work enhances image-to-video models with interactive world modeling through action conditioning and video retrieval augmented generation, reducing compounding errors.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对长视频生成中累积误差和记忆不足问题，本文通过动作条件化和自回归框架赋予图像到视频模型交互能力，并提出视频检索增强生成（VRAG）显式全局状态条件，显著降低长期漂移，使世界模型更适用于规划和决策。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向交互式视频生成的学习世界模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有视频生成模型缺乏交互性且存在累积误差和记忆不足，无法作为世界模型用于规划。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在图像到视频模型上加入动作条件，使用自回归框架和VRAG进行全局状态检索增强。
llm_ranked.result_cn: VRAG显著降低了长期生成的不一致性，在多个任务上提升了世界模型的预测准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法推进了交互式世界模型的发展，可用于机器人规划和模拟。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Simultaneous speech translation with MoE policy learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 同时语音翻译，MoE策略学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 同时语音翻译，MoE策略学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SimulMEGA presents an unsupervised policy learning framework for simultaneous speech translation using Mixture-of-Experts gating to learn read/write decisions.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: SimulMEGA针对同时语音翻译中质量-延迟权衡和策略学习问题，提出基于前缀训练和MoE精炼器的无监督策略框架。该方法隐式学习读写决策，无需额外推理开销，在多语言场景下显著提升翻译质量和语义连贯性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SimulMEGA：MoE路由器作为同时语音翻译的高级策略制定者
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有同时语音翻译系统在多语言场景下难以学习统一读写策略，平衡质量与延迟。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 结合前缀训练和MoE门控机制的无监督策略学习，隐式优化读写决策。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多对多翻译任务上，SimulMEGA在延迟约束下取得更高的翻译质量和语义连贯性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SimulMEGA为实现高效实时语音翻译提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: speech translation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Training world models with reinforcement learning and verifiable rewards
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用强化学习和可验证奖励训练世界模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用强化学习和可验证奖励训练世界模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: RLVR-World uses reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards to directly optimize world models for transition prediction metrics, outperforming MLE across modalities.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: RLVR-World针对世界模型训练目标与任务指标不一致的问题，提出用可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）直接优化世界模型。将世界模型建模为自回归序列预测，利用解码后预测的指标作为奖励。在语言和视频世界模型上均取得显著性能提升。
llm_ranked.title_zh: RLVR-World：用强化学习训练世界模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 标准的最大似然估计训练目标与世界模型的任务指标（如准确率、感知质量）不一致。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出RLVR-World框架，使用强化学习直接优化解码后预测的指标作为奖励。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个语言和视频世界模型基准上，RLVR-World优于MLE基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: RLVR-World提供了一种通用训练范式，可提升世界模型的任务相关性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: vision-language-action model preserving open-world reasoning for robotics
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 保留开放世界推理能力的视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 保留开放世界推理能力的视觉-语言-动作模型用于机器人
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ChatVLA-2 retains VLM open-world reasoning capabilities in a VLA model, enabling robots to reason and act on diverse tasks without losing core competencies, achieving strong generalization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视觉-语言-动作模型在适应机器人任务时丢失预训练VLM开放世界推理能力的问题，提出ChatVLA-2模型。它通过保留VLM的识别、数学和视觉空间智能，并设计推理遵循模块将推理转化为具体动作。实验表明ChatVLA-2在多个机器人任务中保持高泛化性能，显著优于现有端到端VLA方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ChatVLA-2：具有开放世界推理能力的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLA模型在微调时会丢失VLM的关键能力。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出ChatVLA-2，保留并扩展VLM的开放世界推理和推理遵循能力，将推理转化为机器人动作。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人操控任务上展现了强大的泛化和推理能力。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为通用机器人智能提供了保留VLM能力的VLA范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: world model for LLM agents with neurosymbolic alignment
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于神经符号学习的世界对齐方法用于LLM智能体
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于神经符号学习的世界对齐方法用于LLM智能体
llm_ranked.tldr_en: WALL-E proposes a training-free world alignment method using neurosymbolic learning to build accurate world models from LLMs, enabling an RL-free model-based agent via MPC.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对LLM作为世界模型时环境动态知识不足的问题，提出无需训练的世界对齐方法，通过从探索轨迹中提取符号知识（动作规则、知识图谱、场景图）并编码为可执行代码来调节LLM智能体的策略。进一步基于模型预测控制（MPC）构建无强化学习的智能体WALL-E，避免了传统MPC的高昂优化成本。实验表明该方法有效提升了LLM智能体在多种环境中的表现。
llm_ranked.title_zh: WALL-E: 通过神经符号学习实现世界对齐以改进基于世界模型的LLM智能体
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 缩小LLM先验知识与指定环境动态之间的差距，构建准确的世界模型。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用LLM从探索轨迹中提取符号知识并编码为可执行代码，通过MPC框架实现无需训练的世界对齐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种环境中验证了所提方法能有效提升LLM智能体的性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种无需训练的符号世界对齐方法，为基于世界模型的LLM智能体提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: spatiotemporal VLA pretraining for robotics
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于机器人学的时空视觉-语言-动作预训练
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于机器人学的时空视觉-语言-动作预训练
llm_ranked.tldr_en: 4D-VLA introduces depth and temporal information into VLA pretraining via sequential RGB-D inputs, aligning coordinate systems to reduce chaos and improve efficiency.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对现有VLA预训练中因输入不完整导致的坐标系混乱和状态混乱问题，提出将4D信息（深度和时间）融入视觉特征，利用连续RGB-D输入对齐机器人与场景的坐标系。该方法有效缓解了条件动作分布分散的问题，显著提升了预训练效率。在多个机器人数据集上的实验表明，4D-VLA能够学习更一致的表示，促进跨场景迁移。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 4D-VLA: 具有跨场景校准的时空视觉-语言-动作预训练
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决机器人数据预训练中因输入不完整导致的坐标系统混乱和状态混乱问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 通过引入深度和时间信息到视觉特征，使用连续RGB-D输入对齐坐标系。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 有效缓解了条件动作分布分散问题，提升了预训练效率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种利用4D信息进行跨场景校准的VLA预训练方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: open-source omnimodal LLM with real-time emotional speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 开源的具有实时情感语音合成的全模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 开源的具有实时情感语音合成的全模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: OpenOmni introduces a two-stage training framework for open-source omnimodal LLMs, achieving real-time emotional speech synthesis via progressive multimodal alignment.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对开源全模态研究中高质量数据集缺失和实时情感语音合成挑战，提出两阶段训练框架：先对预训练语音模型在图像-文本任务上进一步训练实现对齐，再集成语音生成模块。该方法使得模型在图像、文本和语音的理解与生成上均达到先进水平，特别实现了接近零样本的实时情感语音合成。开源模型和数据集推动了全模态研究的发展。
llm_ranked.title_zh: OpenOmni: 通过渐进式多模态对齐和实时情感语音合成推进开源全模态大语言模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决开源全模态大语言模型中缺乏高质量数据集和实时情感语音合成的挑战。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出两阶段训练框架，先进行全模态对齐，再进行实时情感语音生成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实现了先进的全模态理解和生成性能，特别是在实时情感语音合成上表现出色。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 推动了开源全模态大语言模型的发展，提供了高质量数据集和模型。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: expressive speech synthesis

llm_ranked.evidence_en: physics-inspired approach for acoustic field learning and rendering
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于物理的声场学习与渲染方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于物理的声场学习与渲染方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Versa uses reciprocity to estimate room impulse responses from sparse measurements, enabling immersive spatial audio rendering.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对虚拟环境中实现沉浸式听觉体验需要灵活声场建模的问题，提出“重新合成”任务，即从稀疏发射器位置估计任意发射位置的房间脉冲响应。利用互易性原理，通过交换发射器和听音器姿态生成密集虚拟发射位置，并采用自监督学习方法处理增益模式差异。实验表明该方法能高效学习声场，支持动态源位置的沉浸式音频渲染。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 利用互易性重新合成声场
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 实现虚拟环境中支持动态声源位置的沉浸式听觉体验。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用互易性原理和自监督学习从稀疏测量中估计房间脉冲响应。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 有效生成了密集虚拟发射位置，实现了准确的声场估计。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种基于互易性的物理启发式声场学习方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: spatial audio processing and rendering techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: speech tokenizer for unified speech modeling
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向统一语音建模的语音分词器
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向统一语音建模的语音分词器
llm_ranked.tldr_en: TaDiCodec is a text-aware diffusion speech tokenizer that unifies semantic and acoustic tokenization via end-to-end optimization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: TaDiCodec提出了一种文本感知的扩散语音分词器，通过扩散自编码器实现端到端优化，集成了文本引导的解码器，避免了传统多级残差量化或辅助模型依赖。该方法在语音重建质量和下游语音语言模型上表现优异，为统一语音生成与理解提供了高效令牌化基础。
llm_ranked.title_zh: TaDiCodec：面向语音语言建模的文本感知扩散语音分词器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音分词器依赖多层残差量化或复杂两阶段训练，且需要辅助模型提取语义特征。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用扩散自编码器框架，联合优化量化与重建，并在解码器中引入文本引导以增强重建质量。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在语音重建质量和下游语音语言模型任务上取得先进结果，且训练流程简化。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: TaDiCodec为语音语言建模提供了高效且统一的令牌化方案，有助于推动语音生成与理解模型的融合。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 查找语音翻译、表现力语音生成、语音生成与理解统一相关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: voice translation; speech translation; expressive speech synthesis; unified speech generation and understanding; speech to speech translation; speech to speech translation papers; expressive speech generation research; unified speech generation and understanding models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: zero-shot podcast generation with expressive speech
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 零样本播客生成，表现力语音合成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 零样本播客生成，表现力语音合成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MoonCast generates high-quality zero-shot podcasts with multi-speaker and spontaneous style addressing long speech and spontaneity challenges.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: MoonCast针对长语音和自发对话场景提出解决方案，实现零样本高质量播客生成。它通过分段建模和口语化风格迁移，生成长达数分钟的多说话人自然对话，在自然度和表现力上显著优于现有TTS系统，拓展了表现力语音合成的应用边界。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoonCast：高质量零样本播客生成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有TTS无法生成长时间、多说话人、自发对话风格的播客内容。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 通过分段生成和口语风格建模，结合零样本说话人适应，实现长篇多说话人播客合成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在客观指标和主观听感评测中均达到当前最优，特别是在自然度和表现力上。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MoonCast将TTS能力扩展到播客等实际场景，为表达性语音生成提供了新范式。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: expressive speech synthesis

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multilingual multi-task speech-to-text translation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多语言多任务语音到文本翻译
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多语言多任务语音到文本翻译
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Objective Soups proposes a method for multilingual multi-task speech processing combining ASR and ST via soups of objectives.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: Objective Soups针对多语言多任务语音处理中目标冲突问题，提出将多目标优化分解为独立优化再组合的“目标汤”方法。在ASR和语音到文本翻译联合建模中，该方法避免了梯度冲突难以找到共同下降方向的问题，在多个语对上取得性能提升，为多任务语音翻译提供了高效解决方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 目标汤：多语言多任务语音处理建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多语言多任务语音模型（如ASR和翻译）中多目标优化存在目标冲突，难以找到共同下降方向。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 独立优化每个目标再通过模型参数平均（目标汤）进行组合，避免梯度竞争。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个语音翻译基准上超过联合训练和单任务模型，训练效率更高。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 目标汤方法为多任务语音处理提供了一种实用且有效的训练策略。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: speech translation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: text-driven talking audio-video generation with style mimic
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 文本驱动的人脸说话视频生成，模仿说话风格
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 文本驱动的人脸说话视频生成，模仿说话风格
llm_ranked.tldr_en: OmniTalker proposes a dual-branch DiT architecture for one-shot text-driven talking audio-video generation, jointly producing synchronized audio and video with style mimicking of the target identity.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出OmniTalker，一个统一框架，可从输入文本实时生成同步的说话音频和视频，并模仿目标身份的语言和面部运动风格。采用双分支扩散Transformer结构，分别处理音频和视频生成，通过跨模态融合模块在浅层整合信息。实验证明该方法在生成质量和风格模仿上优于现有方法，为文本驱动的人脸动画提供了高效解决方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: OmniTalker：一种基于多模态风格模仿的实时文本驱动说话音频-视频生成方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 音频驱动的人脸生成已取得进展，但文本驱动方法尚未充分探索，特别是同步生成音频和视频并模仿风格。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用双分支扩散Transformer架构，一个分支生成音频，另一个生成视频，浅层引入跨模态融合模块整合信息。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明，OmniTalker在文本驱动的说话视频生成中实现了高质量同步输出和风格模仿。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 本文为文本驱动的人脸动画提供了一种统一的高效解决方案，有望推动虚拟人实时交互应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: expressive speech synthesis

llm_ranked.evidence_en: persistent embodied world model with memory for long-horizon simulation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 具有显式记忆的持久具身世界模型，支持长期一致性模拟
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 具有显式记忆的持久具身世界模型，支持长期一致性模拟
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a persistent embodied world model with explicit memory, enabling consistent long-horizon simulation by predicting RGB-D video with scene memory.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出一种新的持久化具身世界模型，通过显式记忆先前生成的内容，克服了现有视频模型缺乏场景记忆的局限性。该模型在生成时预测RGB-D视频，能够在复杂部分可观测环境中实现更一致的长期规划模拟。实验证明该方法在长期一致性上显著优于基线模型。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 学习3D持久化具身世界模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有世界模型缺乏对场景的记忆，只能基于当前观测预测，导致长期规划不一致。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出持久化视频扩散模型，引入显式记忆存储先前生成的内容，预测RGB-D视频。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在长期模拟一致性上大幅优于现有方法，支持更可靠的长期规划。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 具有记忆的持久世界模型是提升具身智能体长期规划能力的关键方向。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: spatial audio-driven human motion generation with SAM dataset
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用空间音频驱动人体运动生成，并构建首个空间音频-运动数据集
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用空间音频驱动人体运动生成，并构建首个空间音频-运动数据集
llm_ranked.tldr_en: MOSPA introduces the first spatial audio-driven human motion dataset and method, generating realistic motion responses from spatial audio features.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对空间音频驱动的人体运动生成问题，构建了首个大规模高质量空间音频-运动数据集SAM，并提出MOSPA方法。该方法能从空间音频信号中提取空间特征，生成与音频空间属性一致的人体运动。实验证明了空间特征对运动生成质量的关键作用，为虚拟人交互提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 🎧MOSPA：空间音频驱动的人体运动生成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有研究忽略空间音频对运动的影响，缺乏空间音频-运动数据集和方法。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建SAM数据集，设计从空间音频提取空间特征并生成运动的模型。
llm_ranked.result_cn: MOSPA生成的运动在空间响应上明显优于忽略空间音频的基线方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 空间音频是驱动虚拟人运动的重要模态，该工作填补了相关空白。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: spatial audio processing and rendering techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: VLA reasoning with reinforced visual latent planning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过强化视觉潜在规划进行VLA推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过强化视觉潜在规划进行VLA推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ThinkAct proposes a dual-system VLA framework with reinforced visual latent planning for long-horizon reasoning and action execution.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出ThinkAct，一个双系统VLA框架，结合高层推理和低层动作执行。它训练多模态LLM生成具身推理计划，并通过强化学习优化视觉奖励（基于目标完成和轨迹一致性）。该方法使VLA模型能够进行显式推理和多步规划，在复杂任务中显著优于端到端方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ThinkAct：通过强化视觉潜在规划进行视觉-语言-动作推理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLA模型端到端映射缺乏显式推理，难以适应复杂任务和多步规划。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计双系统框架，高层LLM生成推理计划，低层执行动作，通过强化学习优化视觉潜在规划。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个具身推理任务上，ThinkAct显著优于现有VLA方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 显式推理和强化规划是提升VLA模型泛化性和适应性的关键。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Knowledge insulating for efficient VLA models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 知识绝缘的高效VLA模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 知识绝缘的高效VLA模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Knowledge Insulating VLA models separate VLM knowledge from action modules for fast training and inference with better generalization.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大型VLM带来实时推理障碍和离散token问题。本文提出Knowledge Insulating方法，将VLM语义知识与动作专家隔离，使VLA模型训练快、推理快且泛化更好，解决了大规模VLM在机器人控制中的效率瓶颈。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 知识绝缘的视觉-语言-动作模型：快速训练、快速推理、更好泛化
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大型VLM参数多、输出离散，难以满足机器人实时连续控制需求。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将VLM知识隔离到独立模块，动作专家直接使用连续输出，减少计算开销。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人任务上，训练和推理速度显著提升，泛化性能优于现有VLA方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 知识绝缘策略有效平衡了VLM语义迁移与实时控制效率。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: world-aware planning for embodied agents, world model integration
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向具身智能体的世界感知规划，世界模型融合
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向具身智能体的世界感知规划，世界模型融合
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes World-Aware Planning Narrative Enhancement (WAP) to infuse LVLMs with comprehensive environmental understanding, enabling better world-aware planning for embodied tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文针对大视觉语言模型在具身规划任务中对环境理解不足的问题，提出世界感知规划叙事增强框架（WAP）。WAP通过注入视觉外观建模、空间推理、功能抽象和语法基础四种认知能力，使模型在复杂多步任务中有效利用环境上下文进行规划。实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型在不熟悉环境中的规划成功率，为世界模型在具身智能中的应用提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 世界感知规划叙事增强大视觉语言模型规划器
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 当前大视觉语言模型在具身规划任务中缺乏对环境的全面理解，导致复杂长时程规划表现不佳。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出世界感知规划叙事增强框架，通过四种认知能力注入（视觉外观、空间推理、功能抽象、语法基础）强化模型的环境理解。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个具身规划基准上显著提升规划成功率，尤其在不熟悉环境中表现突出。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 世界感知的规划叙事增强是提升视觉语言模型具身规划能力的有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Training-free acceleration for VLA models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: VLA模型的免训练加速
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: VLA模型的免训练加速
llm_ranked.tldr_en: EfficientVLA introduces a training-free inference acceleration and compression framework for Vision-Language-Action models, systematically eliminating computational and memory bottlenecks by exploiting multifaceted redundancies.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: EfficientVLA针对VLA模型推理计算和内存瓶颈，提出一种免训练的加速与压缩框架。该框架系统地利用模型中的多重冗余，在不需重新训练的情况下提升推理速度。实验证明其在保持性能的同时大幅降低资源消耗，使VLA模型更适用于实际机器人部署。
llm_ranked.title_zh: EfficientVLA：视觉-语言-动作模型的免训练加速与压缩
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLA模型计算和内存需求高，现有加速方案仅孤立优化，无法全面解决瓶颈。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出结构化的免训练推理加速框架EfficientVLA，利用多种冗余进行协同优化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个VLA基准上，EfficientVLA显著加速推理并减少内存占用，性能损失极小。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: EfficientVLA实现了VLA模型的高效部署，推动具身智能实际应用。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Cognition-aligned VLA models with instruction-driven routing
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 认知对齐的VLA模型，指令驱动路由与稀疏化
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 认知对齐的VLA模型，指令驱动路由与稀疏化
llm_ranked.tldr_en: CogVLA proposes a cognition-aligned Vision-Language-Action framework with instruction-driven routing and sparsification to improve efficiency and performance without extensive post-training.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: CogVLA针对VLA模型后训练开销大的问题，提出认知对齐的框架，通过指令驱动的路由与稀疏化策略，在保持端到端一致性前提下提升效率。在机器人任务上验证了其加速效果和性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CogVLA：通过指令驱动的路由与稀疏化实现认知对齐的视觉-语言-动作模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有VLA模型需要大量后训练，且稀疏化策略忽视模态间语义耦合。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CogVLA框架，利用指令驱动路由和稀疏化，保持视觉-语言-动作语义耦合。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个VLA基准上实现显著加速，性能与完整模型相当。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CogVLA提供了一种高效的VLA部署方案，促进具身智能的可扩展性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Spatial sound processing for audio-visual reasoning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 空间声音处理用于音频-视觉推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 空间声音处理用于音频-视觉推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper investigates audio-visual spatial reasoning by combining spatial sound with visual perception, teaching LLMs to infer object locations from sound cues.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文研究音频-视觉空间推理问题，利用空间声音和视觉信息教授大语言模型进行空间推理。通过设计空间音频任务，模型能根据声音来源推断物体位置，展示了空间音频在智能体推理中的潜力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 听到你了：利用视觉和空间声音教授大语言模型空间推理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有音频-视觉方法多使用单声道音频，缺乏空间位置信息，无法完成高级空间推理。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计空间音频-视觉任务，利用双耳音频和视觉输入训练LLM进行空间推理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明模型能有效结合空间声音和视觉信息，准确推理物体位置。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 空间音频显著增强智能体的空间推理能力，为人机交互和机器人提供新思路。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: spatial audio processing and rendering techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: auditory scene analysis with direction-of-arrival estimation (spatial audio)
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 听觉场景分析，包含方向到达估计（空间音频）
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 听觉场景分析，包含方向到达估计（空间音频）
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DeepASA is a multi-purpose network for auditory scene analysis that uses object-oriented processing and chain-of-inference to unify source separation, dereverberation, event detection, and direction-of-arrival estimation, achieving state-of-the-art performance on complex multi-source scenes.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对复杂听觉场景中多声源重叠和动态移动带来的分析挑战，提出DeepASA多用途网络。它采用面向对象处理策略，将听觉特征封装为对象中心表示，并通过链式推理机制逐步精化。该网络统一了源分离、去混响、事件检测、分类和方向到达估计等任务。实验结果表明DeepASA在多个基准上取得最优结果，尤其擅长处理大规模多源场景。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DeepASA：面向对象的多用途听觉场景分析网络
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 复杂听觉场景中多个相似声源重叠且动态移动，现有模型难以统一处理。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出面向对象处理策略，将听觉特征封装为对象中心表示，并通过链式推理机制精化，统一进行源分离、去混响、事件检测和方向估计。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个听觉场景分析基准上达到最优性能，尤其在大规模多输入多输出场景。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为复杂听觉场景提供了一体化的高效分析框架。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: spatial audio processing and rendering techniques

llm_ranked.evidence_en: large speech-language model for unified long-speech understanding and generation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 大型语音语言模型用于统一长语音理解和生成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 大型语音语言模型用于统一长语音理解和生成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: FastLongSpeech extends large speech-language models for efficient long-speech processing without dedicated datasets, optimizing architecture and training to achieve superior efficiency and quality on understanding and generation tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对大型语音语言模型在长语音处理方面的不足，提出FastLongSpeech框架。该框架通过优化模型架构和训练过程，在不依赖专用长语音数据集的情况下，显著提升了长语音处理的计算效率和生成质量。实验证明，FastLongSpeech在长语音理解与生成基准上均优于现有方法，推动了LSLM在现实长语音场景中的应用。
llm_ranked.title_zh: FastLongSpeech：提升大型语音语言模型的高效长语音处理能力
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大型语音语言模型在长语音处理上面临数据集稀缺和高计算成本问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FastLongSpeech框架，通过高效架构和训练策略扩展LSLM的长语音处理能力，无需专用数据集。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在长语音理解和生成任务上大幅提升了效率和质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为LSLM处理长语音提供了实用的解决方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: vision language action model for robotics
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于机器人的视觉语言动作模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于机器人的视觉语言动作模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Robot-R1 uses reinforcement learning to enhance embodied reasoning from LVLMs, predicting keypoint states for improved robot control.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对监督微调导致灾难性遗忘和泛化下降的问题，本文提出Robot-R1框架，利用强化学习增强大规模视觉语言模型（LVLM）的具身推理能力，预测完成机器人任务所需的下一个关键点状态。实验表明，在多个机器人操纵任务上，Robot-R1显著优于SFT方法，并提升了策略的鲁棒性和泛化性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Robot-R1：用于增强机器人具身推理的强化学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 监督微调数据集启发式构造且未优化机器人控制，导致泛化差和遗忘问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Robot-R1，通过强化学习优化具身推理，预测下一个关键点状态以控制机器人。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个机器人操控任务上取得优于监督微调的性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 强化学习能有效提升LVLM在机器人控制中的推理和泛化能力。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: expressive speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 表现力语音合成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 表现力语音合成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: CoVoMix2 is a non-autoregressive flow-matching framework for zero-shot multi-talker dialogue generation, ensuring speaker consistency and natural conversation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多说话人对话生成中说话人一致性、重叠建模和合成效率低的问题，本文提出CoVoMix2框架，采用全非自回归流匹配直接预测梅尔谱图，无需中间token表示。通过转录级说话人解耦和句子级对齐，实现了零样本多说话人高质量对话生成，比自回归方法速度更快且保持自然流畅。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CoVoMix2：基于全非自回归流匹配推动零样本对话生成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有系统难以保持说话人一致性、建模重叠语音并高效合成连贯对话。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CoVoMix2，使用流匹配直接预测多流转录对应的梅尔谱图，实现非自回归对话生成。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个对话数据集上实现了高质量的零样本多说话人生成，效率显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 全非自回归流匹配为零样本对话生成提供了高效且一致的解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: expressive speech synthesis

llm_ranked.evidence_en: compositional world modeling using program synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用程序合成进行组合式世界建模
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用程序合成进行组合式世界建模
llm_ranked.tldr_en: PoE-World represents world models as products of programmatic experts, enabling strong generalization from sparse data in complex domains.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对传统深度学习世界模型需要大量训练数据且难以从稀疏观测更新知识的问题，提出利用LLM进行程序合成来学习以源代码表示的世界模型。创新地将世界模型表示为程序化专家的指数加权乘积，有效建模复杂非网格世界领域。实验表明该方法在少量数据下实现了强泛化能力，并且支持灵活更新。
llm_ranked.title_zh: PoE-World: 通过程序化专家乘积实现组合式世界建模
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 解决深度学习世界模型数据需求大且难以灵活更新知识的问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将世界模型表示为程序化专家的指数加权乘积，利用LLM合成程序。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在少量数据下实现了强泛化，并能灵活更新。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种程序化组合式世界建模新方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: streaming seq2seq framework applicable to speech translation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 适用于语音翻译的流式序列到序列框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 适用于语音翻译的流式序列到序列框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Delayed Streams Modeling enables flexible streaming sequence-to-sequence learning, applicable to speech recognition and translation by introducing delays between streams.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对传统序列到序列模型需要完整输入才能生成输出的离线限制，提出延迟流建模（DSM）。通过引入流之间的延迟，并选择性馈送或采样，DSM能够对任意输出序列进行流式推理。特别地，对于音频和文本流，可配置实现自动语音识别或语音翻译。该框架以解码器-only语言模型为核心，具有灵活性和通用性。实验表明DSM在流式ASR和翻译任务上有效。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于延迟流建模的流式序列到序列学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 实现灵活的流式序列到序列生成，支持语音翻译等任务。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 通过延迟流建模并选择性馈送流，使用解码器-only语言模型进行流式推理。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在流式ASR和翻译任务上验证了有效性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种通用的流式序列到序列学习框架。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: speech translation

llm_ranked.evidence_en: scene-centric forecasting control in occupancy world model for autonomous driving
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 在占用世界模型中引入以场景为中心的预测控制，用于自动驾驶
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 在占用世界模型中引入以场景为中心的预测控制，用于自动驾驶
llm_ranked.tldr_en: COME integrates scene-centric forecasting control into occupancy world models, separating ego-motion from scene evolution to improve prediction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出COME框架，将场景为中心的预测控制融入占用世界模型。现有方法难以解耦自车运动与场景变化，导致预测不佳。COME通过场景中心预测分支生成与自车无关的未来特征，并使用ControlNet将这些特征转化为条件，控制世界模型生成。在自动驾驶场景中，该方法显著提升了长期预测的准确性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: COME：为占用世界模型添加场景为中心的预测控制
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有世界模型难以区分自车运动和环境变化，导致预测不准确。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入场景中心预测分支生成自车无关的未来特征，通过ControlNet条件化世界模型。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在自动驾驶预测基准上，COME实现了更优的长期动态预测精度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 场景中心解耦是提升世界模型预测质量的有效策略。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Low-bitrate speech coding for speech model applications
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 低比特率语音编码用于语音模型应用
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 低比特率语音编码用于语音模型应用
llm_ranked.tldr_en: FocalCodec achieves low-bitrate speech coding using focal modulation and a single binary codebook, enabling efficient representation for downstream speech tasks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有神经音频编解码器位率高或损失语义/声学信息，且多码本设计复杂。本文提出FocalCodec，基于焦点调制和单二进制码本，在0.16-0.65 kbps超低位率下压缩语音，同时保留语义和声学信息。它为语音翻译、合成等下游任务提供了高效、简洁的表示工具。
llm_ranked.title_zh: FocalCodec：基于焦点调制网络的低比特率语音编码
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音编码在低位率下容易丢失信息，多码本结构增加下游复杂度。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用焦点调制网络和单二进制码本，实现超低位率下语义和声学信息的联合保留。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在0.16-0.65 kbps下重建语音质量优于可比方法，且简化了下游模型架构。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 单码本焦点调制编解码器为高效语音表示提供了新途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 查找语音翻译、表现力语音生成、语音生成与理解统一相关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: voice translation; speech translation; expressive speech synthesis; unified speech generation and understanding; speech to speech translation; speech to speech translation papers; expressive speech generation research; unified speech generation and understanding models.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: scene graph generation for embodied agent contextualization
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 场景图生成用于具身代理上下文化
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 场景图生成用于具身代理上下文化
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ESCA contextualizes embodied agents by grounding their perception in spatial-temporal scene graphs via SGCLIP, an open-domain scene graph foundation model, improving fine-grained grounding and task performance.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多模态大模型在具身代理中细粒度感知不足的问题，提出ESCA框架，通过场景图生成来上下文化代理感知。其核心SGCLIP模型基于CLIP在87K+视频上训练，能够生成开放域时空场景图。该框架增强了代理对视觉特征与文本语义之间链接的捕捉，实验表明在多种具身任务中显著提升了感知准确性和任务成功率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ESCA：通过场景图生成上下文化具身代理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多模态大模型在细粒度视觉与语义联系上捕捉不足，导致感知不准确。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出ESCA框架，通过SGCLIP生成开放域时空场景图，将代理感知基于场景图进行上下文化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个具身任务上提升了感知和推理性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为具身代理提供了一种有效的情景理解与动作上下文化方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Search for papers that combine world models with vision language action models for embodied AI

llm_ranked.evidence_en: 3D voxel belief map for zero-shot object navigation and planning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 3D体素信念图用于零样本物体导航和规划
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 3D体素信念图用于零样本物体导航和规划
llm_ranked.tldr_en: BeliefMapNav uses a 3D voxel-based belief map to estimate target presence distribution globally, improving zero-shot object navigation by enabling non-greedy, spatially-aware decision making.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对零样本物体导航中代理缺乏全局环境理解和空间推理的问题，提出基于3D体素信念图的方法。该方法在体素网格中建模目标存在的先验分布，使代理能够进行全局而非贪婪的导航决策。结合大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的语义推理，在多个基准任务上实现了显著优于现有方法的成功率。
llm_ranked.title_zh: BeliefMapNav：基于3D体素信念图的零样本物体导航
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有零样本导航方法贪心选择目标，缺乏全局环境理解和空间推理。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出3D体素信念图，估计目标存在概率分布，结合语言和视觉模型进行全局规划。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在零样本物体导航基准上显著提高了成功率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 为机器人导航提供了一种有效的环境表示和推理方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: world model for reinforcement learning and planning

llm_ranked.evidence_en: recursive video reasoning with VLMs for embodied tasks
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 使用视觉语言模型进行递归视频推理以支持具身任务
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 使用视觉语言模型进行递归视频推理以支持具身任务
llm_ranked.tldr_en: ROVER recursively decomposes long video trajectories into subtask segments for VLMs to reason over temporally localized frames, significantly improving embodied task reasoning accuracy.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对视觉语言模型在具身任务中难以对长视频序列进行有效推理的问题，提出ROVER递归推理框架。它通过递归将长视频轨迹分解为对应子任务的较短片段，使VLM能够集中注意力于时间局部帧序列，进行更精确的推理。实验表明，ROVER在多个具身推理基准上显著优于直接使用VLMs的方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ROVER：针对具身任务的视频递归推理框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: VLM在处理长视频序列推理时能力有限，影响具身任务执行。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出递归分解视频轨迹为子任务段，用VLM聚焦推理局部帧序列。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在具身任务基准上显著提升了长视频推理的准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提升了VLM在具身场景中的视频理解与推理能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Find research papers on world models, Vision Language Action models, and spatial audio

llm_ranked.evidence_en: vision language action model for robotics
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于机器人的视觉语言动作模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于机器人的视觉语言动作模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: AcTOL learns ordered and continuous vision-language representations from human action videos without rigid goal constraints, improving generalization for embodied agents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对预训练视觉语言表示时过度关注未来帧导致错误关联的问题，本文提出Action Temporal Coherence Learning (AcTOL)，将视频视为有序连续过程而非仅关注末帧，学习顺序且连续的视觉语言表示。在虚拟环境导航和操控任务中，AcTOL预训练的表征显著提升了具身智能体的泛化能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 具身智能体视觉语言预训练中的可证明顺序性与连续性
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有时间对比学习过度对齐末帧，导致视觉语言关联错误。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出AcTOL，将视频视为有序连续过程，学习无刚性目标约束的视觉语言表征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个具身任务上提升了泛化性能和样本效率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 有序连续的视觉语言预训练能有效增强具身智能体的泛化能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: vision language action model for robotics

llm_ranked.evidence_en: end-to-end large speech model with fast audio-text generation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 端到端大型语音模型，支持快速音频-文本生成
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 端到端大型语音模型，支持快速音频-文本生成
llm_ranked.tldr_en: VITA-Audio introduces a Multiple Cross-modal Token Prediction module to generate multiple audio tokens per forward pass, reducing latency in streaming speech-language models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对现有语音模型在流式传输中首次音频令牌生成延迟高的问题，提出端到端大型语音模型VITA-Audio。核心创新是轻量级多模态交叉令牌预测（MCTP）模块，可在单次模型前向中高效生成多个音频令牌，显著加速推理并降低延迟。实验表明该方法在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升了流式处理效率，适用于语音理解和生成统一场景。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VITA-Audio: 用于高效大型语音语言模型的快速交错音频-文本令牌生成
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 降低语音模型在流式传输中首次音频令牌生成的延迟。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 引入多模态交叉令牌预测模块，单次前向生成多个音频令牌。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 显著降低流式推理延迟，保持生成质量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 提出了一种高效的流式语音语言模型加速方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: unified speech generation and understanding

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multitask failure detector for generalist VLA policies
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向通用VLA策略的多任务故障检测器
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向通用VLA策略的多任务故障检测器
llm_ranked.tldr_en: SAFE addresses multitask failure detection for VLAs, proposing a detector that generalizes to unseen tasks and environments for safe robot interaction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文首次定义多任务故障检测问题，并提出SAFE检测器，专为通用机器人策略（如VLA）设计。SAFE能在未见过的任务和环境中检测故障，及时发出警报使机器人停止或求助。实验表明，SAFE在多个任务上具有良好泛化性，提升了VLA部署的安全性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SAFE：面向视觉-语言-动作模型的多任务故障检测
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 通用VLA策略在部署时成功率有限，需要能够泛化到新任务的故障检测器来保证安全交互。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出多任务故障检测问题，并设计SAFE检测器，利用多任务训练实现对新任务和环境的泛化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: SAFE在多个未见任务上实现了高精度故障检测，有效提升了VLA策略的安全性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多任务故障检测是通用机器人策略安全部署的重要组件，SAFE为此提供了有效方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: adversarial prevention for production LLM-based speech synthesis
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 针对生产环境LLM语音合成系统的对抗防御方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 针对生产环境LLM语音合成系统的对抗防御方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: E2E-VGuard proposes an adversarial prevention method for end-to-end LLM-based speech synthesis systems, addressing voice-cloning fraud.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出E2E-VGuard，一种针对端到端大语言模型语音合成系统的对抗防御方法。现有防御假设手动标注文本，而真实场景使用ASR生成文本，存在安全漏洞。E2E-VGuard利用对抗样本技术，在ASR环节注入保护，有效防止语音克隆欺诈。实验表明该方法在保证合成质量的同时显著提升安全性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: E2E-VGuard：面向生产环境端到端LLM语音合成的对抗防御
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有语音合成防御方法假设手动标注文本，不适用于自动标注的端到端系统，存在安全风险。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 在ASR生成文本阶段注入对抗性扰动，使得恶意用户无法利用合成语音进行身份模仿。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在防范语音克隆攻击上取得高成功率，同时合成音频质量损失极小。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: E2E-VGuard为端到端语音合成系统提供了实用的安全防护方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: world model for object goal navigation, generative imagination
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 用于物体目标导航的世界模型，生成式想象
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 用于物体目标导航的世界模型，生成式想象
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes GOAL, a generative flow-based framework that distills LLM priors for semantic map imagination, enabling generalizable agent navigation in unseen environments.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文针对物体目标导航中未知环境泛化难的问题，提出生成式流程框架GOAL。GOAL通过将大语言模型的先验知识蒸馏为二维高斯场注入语义地图，利用流程模型建模室内环境语义分布。该方法在多个导航基准上超越现有确定性方法，提升了智能体在未见环境中的想象与导航能力，展示了世界模型在具身导航中的应用价值。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 将大语言模型先验蒸馏到流程模型以实现物体目标导航中智能体的可泛化想象
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有物体目标导航方法依赖确定性模型，无法处理室内布局不确定性，泛化能力有限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出生成式流程框架GOAL，使用大语言模型的空间先验并通过二维高斯场蒸馏到语义地图生成中。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种未知环境中成功导航至目标物体，泛化性能显著优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 将大语言模型先验与生成式流程结合可有效提升导航智能体的环境想象与泛化能力。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: test-time adaptation for speech foundation models
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 语音基础模型的测试时自适应
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 语音基础模型的测试时自适应
